brief: US and Iran escalate strikes for seventh night while wildfires rage in Norway and Canada; research explores writing pedagogy, AI agents, and human-robot juggling.
news_summary: US launched seventh night of strikes on Iran as Hormuz conflict escalates; wildfires destroy homes in Norway and threaten air quality in the US, while Laos denies evidence in tourist methanol deaths.
papers_summary: Studies examine professional identities of writing instructors, children's multimodal compositions, and the impact of ChatGPT on personal statement revision; other work benchmarks MLLMs on visualization literacy and analyzes urban driving data.

en.brief: US and Iran escalate strikes for seventh night while wildfires rage in Norway and Canada; research explores writing pedagogy, AI agents, and human-robot juggling.
en.news_summary: US launched seventh night of strikes on Iran as Hormuz conflict escalates; wildfires destroy homes in Norway and threaten air quality in the US, while Laos denies evidence in tourist methanol deaths.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine professional identities of writing instructors, children's multimodal compositions, and the impact of ChatGPT on personal statement revision; other work benchmarks MLLMs on visualization literacy and analyzes urban driving data.

zh.brief: 世界盃決賽阿根廷對西班牙引關注，英國工黨貝安德就任黨魁，香港禁書清單持續擴大。美國與伊朗衝突升級，挪威大火肆虐。研究方面聚焦寫作教學與AI安全。
zh.news_summary: 世界盃決賽看點包括跨世代對決與高額獎金；貝安德當選工黨黨魁，中英關係受關注；香港禁書清單再添多本。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無中文重點論文，國際研究探討AI編程代理安全性及多模態模型視覺化能力。

todays_image.caption: Both the first helicopter mail sack and the methanol-laced drinks in Laos represent unverified cargo whose true contents—news or poison—are only revealed upon arrival.
todays_image.title: First helicopter mail sack
